titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Embassy in the Philippines

head.hi: The Secretary of State to the Embassy in the Philippines

div.p: 719. Embtel 780, May 11.Not printed. Emb requested endeavor secure definite commitment Phil Govt on date for resumption FCN Treaty negotiations.A revised treaty draft was sent in the Department’s 54, March 19, to Manila, not printed. Dept prepared, provided necessary arrangements can be made, send Dr. Robert R. Wilson latter part June to assist Emb if Quirino ready negotiate.

Dr. Wilson, Prof Pol Sci., Duke Univ., in charge Dept’s commercial treaty work 1944–46, member group negotiated China treaty, 1946, participated in treaty talks with officials Phil Emb last summer, will be on Dept’s commercial treaty staff June–September this year. He is one of nation’s outstanding specialists international law, particularly relating treaties.

If opening Phil negotiations delayed beyond July 1, Dept planning send Wilson to Canberra and Wellington for pending negotiations. Reply soonest.An initial negotiation session was held at Manila on July 2.
